safety_use_cases.label: Forklift stop compliance at doors/intersections
safety_use_cases.description: Detect when PIT operators fail to make required full stops at roll-up doors or intersections to prevent collisions and near-misses.

evidence.quote: Are they stopping and starting where they're supposed to stop and start? Designated to stop and start?
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: We'll stop at the roll-up door before proceeding. This operator doesn't stop at all, right? They actually hit the door. Doink. They then move forward. They almost hit someone else.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: PIT speed monitoring (forklifts and yard trucks)
safety_use_cases.description: Monitor vehicle speeding for forklifts inside and trucks outside to reduce high-severity incidents.

evidence.quote: So we do things like, is the forklift going too fast? Is the truck outside going too fast?
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: PIT-to-pedestrian proximity alerts
safety_use_cases.description: Alert when a moving PIT comes within an unsafe distance of a pedestrian to reduce strike risks.

evidence.quote: So like I said, pit proximity, guys, we do pit to pedestrian and pit to pit.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: The rule is basically there's a three-foot halo around the moving pit.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: If they come within three feet of another person, it gets triggered.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: PIT-to-PIT proximity and congestion detection
safety_use_cases.description: Detect PIT-to-PIT near misses and collisions, identify congestion hot spots, and enable traffic pattern changes to lower risk.

evidence.quote: basically, guys, we have four pits trying to go through the same door. Doink, they actually hit each other.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: Creating a circular travel pattern. Guess what happened overnight? Their pit-to-pit triggers from Voxel fell off a cliff.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Ergonomics: overreaching detection
safety_use_cases.description: Detect overreaching (e.g., tippy-toe stacking) to coach safer material handling and adjust stacking policies.

evidence.quote: Overreaching. This individual down here is going to get on their tippy toes, stacking a wood pallet.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: if we just don't let them stack the wood pallets this high, let's see what happens. They're overreaching in this area, fell off a cliff.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Ergonomics: improper bend detection
safety_use_cases.description: Identify improper bending during lifts to reduce musculoskeletal injuries.

evidence.quote: Improper bends, guys, same premise, just going the other direction.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Obstruction detection in exits, extinguishers, and walkways
safety_use_cases.description: Monitor for blocked emergency exits, fire extinguishers, pedestrian walkways, and items protruding over safety lines to prevent unsafe detours and egress hazards.

evidence.quote: Basically guys, I call it clutter detection, should something never be left somewhere.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: We don't want an emergency exit blocked, and or the fire extinguisher.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: We've used this a lot at Pioneer Market Group, like laser etched pedestrian walkways. We don't want product left in there, so then they veer out into the busy walkways.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: They don't want stuff over too far over the yellow line. This individual came and left a pallet too far over the yellow line. It's now an obstruction in their freeway.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: No-pedestrian zone enforcement
safety_use_cases.description: Detect pedestrians in designated no-walk zones to reduce exposure to vehicle and equipment hazards.

evidence.quote: Area controls. Things like no pedestrian zones, obstructions. Should someone never be somewhere?
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Data-driven hotspot analysis for safety risk
safety_use_cases.description: Use ‘how often, when, and where’ analytics to pinpoint high-risk locations and times for targeted coaching or procedural changes.

evidence.quote: we take a data-driven approach here first and foremost... how often, when, and where these things are taking place.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: over the last about a month, hundreds of no-stops approaching 50-60% are happening at Dr. 12.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: now we're mapping over the last about a month, Thursday through Wednesday, all several hours of the day, when these no-stops are taking place.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Use clips for safety coaching and training
safety_use_cases.description: Leverage captured clips to assign actions, coach individuals, and use examples in team training sessions.

evidence.quote: whether it's coaching, whether it's, hey, I want to use this in my next training session with the team, right?
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Surface secondary hazards (e.g., working at heights without fall protection)
safety_use_cases.description: Identify additional safety hazards present in clips flagged for another issue to broaden corrective actions.

evidence.quote: this came into Voxel for an improper bend. But it's probably worth addressing more than the fact that these two thought it was a good idea to send this individual eight feet up in the air with no safety harness.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Reduce property damage, equipment repair costs, and product shrink from PIT incidents
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Use detection of no-stops and PIT collisions to reduce damage to doors and equipment and minimize product shrink.

evidence.quote: I may have property damage. The door might be broken. I may have equipment repair needed on the pit for hitting the door.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: And if those two did hit each other, this product is now shrink on some level, right?
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Accelerate incident investigations with timestamps
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Use Voxel’s timestamps to quickly locate relevant footage in the VMS and avoid hours of manual video review.

evidence.quote: And that's when you go back to your camera system and spend a couple of hours of your life, maybe more, trying to figure out when the heck that mark got on your door.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: we timestamp everything.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: So, you know exactly where you're going.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Obstruction detection for Federal Safety Bureau compliance and fines avoidance
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Monitor for blocked egress and fire extinguisher access to maintain compliance and avoid regulatory fines.

evidence.quote: We don't want an emergency exit blocked, and or the fire extinguisher. If Federal Safety Bureau was walking through this facility, that's a fine, right?
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>
